questions.question: What is the young person in the yellow shirt doing in these video clips?
questions.answer_key: Running and practicing hurdles on a track field
questions.rationale: Main action and subject clearly visible across multiple frames

questions.question: What type of athletic facility is shown in the background?
questions.answer_key: A stadium or sports complex with a soccer field and track
questions.rationale: Setting is essential context for understanding the activity

questions.question: What equipment is visible on the track field?
questions.answer_key: Hurdles and a soccer goal with padding
questions.rationale: Key objects that define the training environment

questions.question: What is the time of day when this training occurs?
questions.answer_key: Evening or night, with artificial lighting illuminating the track
questions.rationale: Lighting conditions are noticeable and contextually relevant

questions.question: What visible text or signage appears in the stadium background?
questions.answer_key: Sponsor banners and signage along the track perimeter
questions.rationale: On-screen text/signage is standard AD inclusion
